'''Crimpler''' was an undefeated [[Lorell]]ian [[kickboxer]] who was drafted into the [[Hapan Royal Navy]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. He saw defeat at the [[Battle of Fondor]] and defected to become a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]]. During an attempt to capture the [[Hapan]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Tenel Ka Djo|Tenel Ka]], he was defeated in unarmed combat and imprisoned by Hapan forces. A [[Ni'Korish (faction)|Ni'Korish]] guard allowed him to escape from the [[Prison/Legends|prison]], killing [[Trisdin Gheer]] in the process, though his memory had been erased by [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] after the [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] [[Sinsor Khal]] removed the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] implant in his neck.
